objective: Extend the budget-profile worker write-set by exactly two connected test fixtures that exercise the real kernel and reference vertical with the same newly frozen exact profile.
executable_blocker: The authorized admission profile intentionally rejects the old max_input_bytes and claims-only fixture shapes still used by two connected positive modules, so full Stage 1 cannot pass without resealing those synthetic authority documents.
preservation_contract: all original envelope constraints acceptance commands and stop conditions remain active
added files receive only synthetic JobSpec resource_limits and Permit quotas profile replacement plus required resealing
no assertion expected value scenario ordering mutation count ledger call or receipt behavior changes
the connected L0 execution and D0/D1 reference vertical continue to run through the real admission kernel ledger and execution boundaries
no source compatibility path default allow or old-profile fallback is introduced
acceptance_commands: python3 -m unittest tests.test_stage1_admission tests.test_stage1_assurance tests.test_stage1_authority_policy tests.test_stage1_l0 tests.test_stage1_execution_assurance tests.test_stage1_reference_vertical -v
exact eight-file write-set fixture-only amendment assertion skip dependency private-locator network and live-authority scan
rollback: Agent 0 discards the worker commit and deletes the isolated branch/worktree. This public test-fixture authority amendment can be reverted independently; no runtime database, domain state or external system is changed.
